name: neural-weights-en-us
phase: Stage 2 (coarse + venue/street/house_number) — multi-script tokenizer + v0.5.1 recipe revert

training.recipe: v0.5.1 recipe (constant LR, no label smoothing, wof-admin 2.0, dep_loc/subregion class_weight=0.3) + v0.6.0-a0 multi-script tokenizer (2.19M WOF names from 7 countries, 0% CJK byte-fallback)

demo_presets.note: All 6 canonical addresses parse correctly. v0.5.4 retains v0.5.3's functional capability.

golden_error_analysis.note: Cross-tokenizer comparison invalid per eval protocol. v0.5.3 baseline was 25.3% but used v0.5.0-a1 tokenizer. Stage 3 labels will resolve most boundary errors (3698) which are schema mismatch, not model error.

known_failure_modes: val_macro_f1 / exact-match metrics NOT comparable to v0.5.3 (tokenizer changed)
CJK/Korean/Thai inputs: tokenizer now handles them but model not trained on non-Latin addresses yet (training corpus is US+FR)
Single-line short addresses (e.g. 'Vermont, USA') confused — too little context
notes: v0.5.4 — multi-script tokenizer foundation. The v0.6.0-a0 tokenizer hit 0% byte-fallback on CJK/Korean/Thai/Arabic (down from 36-75% on v0.5.0-a1). Same 48K vocab size for embedding compatibility. Recipe is the proven v0.5.1 settings. Next: v0.6.0 ships Stage 3 labels (street_prefix/suffix/unit/po_box/intersection) + CRF loss weight > 0 for learned transitions.
